cli.epilog:
Examples:
  python cli.py --lang zh --save-lang
  python cli.py lang set en
  python cli.py check
  python cli.py fetch --topic "AI, coding, startup opportunities"
  python cli.py analyze --input-file inputs/<batch>.md --mode rules
  python cli.py run --analysis-mode auto
  python cli.py archive --dry-run -v
  python cli.py interactive
global.lang_help: UI language en|zh for this run. Default: RSS_AGENT_LANG, else locale.json, else en.
cmd.interactive.help: Interactive menu (TTY only); same actions as non-interactive commands.
cmd.fetch.epilog:
Examples:
  python cli.py fetch
  python cli.py fetch --topic "AI, coding, startup opportunities"
  python cli.py fetch --output-name 2026-03-24-010714-rss-batch.md
cmd.analyze.epilog:
Examples:
  python cli.py analyze --input-file inputs/<batch>.md --mode rules
  python cli.py --report-lang en analyze --input-file inputs/<batch>.md --mode rules
  python cli.py analyze --input-file inputs/<batch>.md --mode skill
cmd.run.epilog:
Examples:
  python cli.py run --analysis-mode auto
  python cli.py --report-lang en run --analysis-mode rules
  python cli.py run --name-prefix daily-run --analysis-mode rules
cmd.report.epilog:
Examples:
  python cli.py report
  python cli.py report --report-file outputs/feed_scores_report.md
cmd.score.epilog:
Examples:
  python cli.py score show
  python cli.py score reset
cmd.archive.help: Archive older batch inputs and analysis outputs; optional watch loop.
cmd.archive.epilog:
Examples:
  python cli.py archive
  python cli.py archive --dry-run -v
  python cli.py archive --keep-batch-stem <stem>
  python cli.py archive --interval 3600
cmd.archive.keep_stem: Batch stem to keep (e.g. 2026-03-24-010714-rss-batch). Default: newest by mtime.
cmd.archive.interval: Repeat archive every N seconds (Ctrl+C to stop).
cmd.archive.dry_run: List files that would be archived without moving.
cmd.lang.help: Show or set persisted UI language (locale.json).
cmd.lang.epilog:
Examples:
  python cli.py lang show
  python cli.py lang set zh
cmd.lang.show.help: Print current UI language and locale file path.
cmd.lang.set.help: Save UI language to locale.json (default for future runs).
interactive.tty: Interactive mode needs a TTY. Run in a real terminal, or use: python cli.py run --help
interactive.pause: Press Enter to return to the menu…
interactive.menu.4: [4] Full pipeline: fetch + analyze + feedback + report (run)
interactive.hint: Check paths, config, and network; you can retry with non-interactive commands.
interactive.lang.title: Language
interactive.analyze.bad_mode: Mode must be rules or skill
interactive.run.bad_mode: analysis_mode must be rules, skill, or auto
interactive.examples.title: Common commands (scripts / CI):
report.overview: This batch covers {sources} sources and {items} items. Entries are filtered toward AI, developer tools, SaaS, open source, startups/hiring, and related themes, with per-item opportunity notes.
report.trend.title: **Key trend judgment:**
report.trend.1: - AI, developer tools, open source, and security signals remain the main thread—prioritize higher-scored items.
report.trend.2: - Scores are for triage only; validate against sources and your context before decisions.
report.insufficient: Insufficient detail; judge with the original source.
report.skill.fallback_overview: This batch has been screened; below is a prioritized summary.
report.skill.rank_placeholder_row: | 1 | (model should output the table) | Product opportunity | See item analysis |
report.skill.conclusion_fallback:
**Top 3 opportunities to follow:**

1. Rank high-scoring items from Item analysis.
2. —
3. —

**Key trend judgment:**
- Summarize 2–3 themes from this batch of sources.
report.extra.reason_ai: AI capabilities are moving from point features to workflow collaboration, with room to evolve further.
report.extra.reason_startup: More capital and market attention suggest the space may be entering a verifiable commercialization phase.
report.extra.reason_security: Reliability and security needs are recurring and often carry strong willingness to pay.
report.extra.reason_source: The source has strong reach in developer and tech communities—useful as an early trend indicator.
report.extra.risk_platform: Heavy reliance on a top platform ecosystem may expose you to API or pricing policy shifts.
report.extra.risk_startup: Funding and buzz are not retention—watch real usage frequency and conversion quality.
report.no_rule.reason: The signal is not specific enough for a high-confidence opportunity call.
report.no_rule.risk: Overweighting low-signal items dilutes focus and ranking quality.
report.no_rule.action: Add to a watchlist and revisit when more evidence appears.
